_comment: Deterministic output. Total 9h meetings / 40h = 77.5% focus time — above 40% threshold.
suggestions: Friday is light (1h meetings) — schedule deep work blocks: morning for the board deck or QA pass
61% of meeting time is recurring — review Design Review and PM Sync for necessity or shortening
Monday is the heaviest day (2.5h) — back-to-back Sprint Planning + CEO 1:1 — protect Tuesday and Wednesday mornings
